name: Sensitive Data Exposure Detection
description: Detects and responds to sensitive data exposure incidents. Riggs AI analyzes the alert using the data exfiltration template to classify the exposed data type and severity. Confirmed exposures trigger immediate access restriction, data owner notification, and a compliance ticket. False positives are annotated and closed. Designed for SOC analysts handling DLP policy violations involving sensitive data found in unauthorized locations.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Microsoft Graph
required_integrations.reason: Restrict access permissions on exposed files and folders

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create compliance tracking ticket for data exposure remediation

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify data owner and SOC team of exposure incident

data.title: Sensitive Data Exposure Alert
data.summary: Triggers on DLP alerts indicating sensitive data found in unauthorized locations

data.title: AI Data Exposure Classification
data.summary: Riggs AI classifies the exposed data type, sensitivity level, and exposure scope

config.custom_instructions: Classify the data sensitivity level (PII, PHI, PCI, confidential, internal). Determine exposure scope and assess risk of unauthorized access.

data.title: Confirmed Exposure?
data.summary: Branch based on whether sensitive data exposure is confirmed

data.title: Restrict Access to Exposed Data
data.summary: Revoke public/unauthorized access permissions on the exposed resource

params.reason: Sensitive data exposure detected — restricting access per DLP policy

data.title: Notify Data Owner
data.summary: Alert the data owner about the exposure via Slack

data.title: Create Compliance Ticket
data.summary: Create a Jira ticket for compliance tracking and remediation follow-up

config.title: Data Exposure: {{$.trigger.alert.resource_name}} — {{$.nodes.dse-2.result.data_classification}}

data.title: Notify SOC Team
data.summary: Send containment summary to SOC alerts channel

data.title: Close Alert — No Exposure
data.summary: Annotate alert as false positive and close

config.note: Data exposure alert reviewed by Riggs AI. Verdict: {{$.nodes.dse-2.result.verdict}}. No confirmed sensitive data exposure — data is properly classified and access is within policy. Closing alert.

data.title: Playbook Complete
data.summary: Sensitive data exposure response workflow finished

config.summary: Sensitive data exposure detection and response completed
